name: reading-assist-extension
description: Browser extension for reading foreign texts — dictionary translations & phonetic guides

scripts.dev: npm run build && vite build --config vite.config.content.ts --watch
scripts.build: tsc && vite build && vite build --config vite.config.content.ts
scripts.build:firefox: tsc && vite build --outDir dist-firefox && vite build --config vite.config.content.ts --outDir dist-firefox
